title: gagea himalensis
intro: Gagea himalensis, also known as Himalayan gagea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Liliaceae, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and bulbous roots. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Gagea himalensis include its ability to treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Gagea himalensis can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used to treat various health issues, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
